name: Scalloped Potatoes (Marge Clark)
recipeIngredient: 6 medium potatoes, pared and thinly sliced (about 6 cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Butter a 2-quart casserole dish.
3. Make a basic white sauce by melting butter in a saucepan, adding flour, salt, pepper, and milk until smooth.
4. Place half of the sliced potatoes in the casserole dish.
5. Cover with half of the chopped onion and half of the sauce.
6. Repeat layers of potatoes, onion, and sauce.
7. Cover and bake for about 1 hour (or longer, up to 1 hour and 15 minutes).
8. Check that the potatoes are nearly tender but not quite done.
9. Uncover and bake an additional 30 minutes until fully cooked.
10. For extra flavor, layer leftover cooked ham in the middle of the dish before serving.
Serves 4–6 (I recommend up to 4 servings).
